pkgmetadata.longdescription: Sigma ToolsThis package contains the following tools for [Sigma](httpsgithub.comNeo23x0sigma) sigmac the Sigma converter merge_sigma Merge a Sigma collection into a minimal set of Sigma rules sigma2misp Import Sigma rules into MISP sigma2attack Create a MITRE ATTCK coverage map sigma_similarity Measure similarity of Sigma rules sigma_uuid Check Sigma identifiers
